## Checklist

- [ ] `package.json` version bumped per [semver](https://semver.org/)
- [ ] `## <version>` section added to `CHANGELOG.md` matching the new version
- [ ] `npm run compile` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] No secrets or `.env` files included
- [ ] If this PR is CI/docs-only and should NOT ship a release, apply the `no-release` label
